subcodes.first_line: O concourse of the earth! By God, the fragrance of the Garment hath been diffused, the horizon of the Manifestation hath been illumined, and He Who spoke upon the Mount hath spoken forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الارض تالله قد تضوعت رائحه القمیص و انار افق الظهور و نطق مکلم الطور و
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @consolation and comfort, @chastisement and requital, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
